name: circuit-next
description: Claude Code plugin that runs configurable developer workflows. Phase 2 wired state: `/circuit:explore` invokes the full explore workflow end-to-end via the project CLI; `/circuit:review` invokes the audit-only review workflow explicitly; `/circuit:run` still routes every free-form task to `/circuit:explore` until the full classifier lands at plan slice P2.8. Future phases add `build`, `repair`, `migrate`, `sweep`, and user-authored custom workflows with per-step model + reasoning-effort + skills configuration.

commands.name: circuit:run
commands.description: Routes every task to the `explore` workflow during the single-workflow phase of Phase 2. Full classifier lands at plan slice P2.8; until then this command is a pass-through to `/circuit:explore`.

commands.name: circuit:explore
commands.description: Investigate, understand, choose among options, or shape an execution plan. Runs the full-spine explore workflow end-to-end via the project CLI, producing a canonical event log + result artifact under the run root.

commands.name: circuit:review
commands.description: Audit a scoped change or artifact with the review workflow. Runs the audit-only review fixture via the project CLI and surfaces the run root, event log, and review result artifact with the current synthesis-writer caveat.
